mission.title: prometheus: Kubernetes SD: Optionally attach namespace and node metadata to targets
mission.description: Kubernetes SD: Optionally attach namespace and node metadata to targets. Requested by 18+ users.

steps.title: Check current prometheus deployment
steps.description:
Verify your prometheus version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus
helm list -n prometheus 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working prometheus installation.

steps.title: Review prometheus configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant prometheus configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus
kubectl get configmap -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=prometheus
```
## Proposal
Kubernetes SD should be extended so the service, pod, endpoints, and ingress roles can optionally attach extra meta labels based on the namespace and node objects that the targets are discovered in (where appropriate; ingress wouldn't

steps.title: Apply the fix for Kubernetes SD: Optionally attach namespace and node…
steps.description:
This PR implements part of the functionality suggested in https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/issues/9510.

In order to gather feedback and keep changes small, this commit only implements attaching metadata from nodes when the `pod` role is used for Kubernetes SD.
```yaml
attach_metadata:
  # Attaches node metadata to discovered targets. Only valid for role: pod, endpoints. 
  # When set to true, Prometheus must have permissions to get Nodes. 
  [ node: <boolean> | default = false ]
  # Attaches namespace metadata to discovered targets. Invalid for role: node.
  # When set to true, Prometheus must have permissions to get Namespaces.
  [ namespace: <boolean> | default = false ]
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus
kubectl get events -n prometheus --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Kubernetes SD: Optionally attach namespace and node…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This PR implements part of the functionality suggested in https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/issues/9510.

In order to gather feedback and keep changes small, this commit only implements attaching metadata from nodes when the `pod` role is used for Kubernetes SD.
codeSnippets:
attach_metadata:
  # Attaches node metadata to discovered targets. Only valid for role: pod, endpoints. 
  # When set to true, Prometheus must have permissions to get Nodes. 
  [ node: <boolean> | default = false ]
  # Attaches namespace metadata to discovered targets. Invalid for role: node.
  # When set to true, Prometheus must have permissions to get Namespaces.
  [ namespace: <boolean> | default = false ]

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with prometheus installed or the issue environment reproducible.
